noAnalyzedHint: No conversation analyzed yet for this project.

high-compaction-rate.title: Sessions too long
high-compaction-rate.body: {{pct}}% of your conversations hit at least one compaction ({{count}} in the window). Sessions often exceed the context window — consider /clear earlier, or split by topic.

frequent-degraded-zone.title: Regularly in degraded zone
frequent-degraded-zone.body: {{pct}}% of conversations reach the degraded zone (>75% of window). Answer quality drops at these volumes — shorter sessions would help.

late-session-drift.title: Late-session drift
late-session-drift.body: {{pct}}% of conversations show ≥2 frictions in the second half + large context. Classic lost-in-the-middle pattern — restating intent mid-session would help.

cache-waste-pattern.title: Cache waste on average
cache-waste-pattern.body: ~{{avgK}}k tokens of cache rewrite per conversation ({{totalM}}M total over the window). Pauses > 5 min break the cache — more continuous sessions or the 1h cache beta would help.

systemic-low-health.title: Low average score
systemic-low-health.body: Average score {{score}}/100 — the current workflow triggers too many issues. Review the recurring tips below to identify the main cause.
